feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP CAP - Access Table HDI in a different space deploy error
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We have a CAP project in which we need to access a table in an HDI deployed in a CF space different from the CAP app.

The table is called ZPMSERVLOC and it is in a schema called SDI_HDI_DB_2.

Our data model within the CAP project is as follows:

namespace SDI_HDI_DB_2;
 
@cds.persistence.exists
entity ZPMSERVLOC {
  key MANDT      : String(3) not null;
  key ZZIDINTERN : String(15) not null;
  key ZZSITE     : String(30) not null;
      ZZSITEEXT  : String(30);
      ZZSERVID   : String(200);
      ZZMARKDEL  : String(1);
}

We have declared an .hdsynonym as follows:

{
  "ZPMSERVLOC": {
    "target": {
      "object": "ZPMSERVLOC",
      "schema": "SDI_HDI_DB_2"
    }
  }
}

The relevant role is granted with SELECT privileges to the table.

            {
                "name": "ZPMSERVLOC",
                "type": "TABLE",
                "privileges": [ "SELECT" ]
            }

We have as well the user provided service with the credentials of the external HDI.

But when deploying, the database deployer app is failing with the following error:

Error: The file requires "db://SDI_HDI_DB_2_ZPMSERVLOC" which is not provided by any file [8212001]

Any idea what is wrong? Maybe the number 2 in the namespace may be something that is affecting?

Many thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Built-In Chat Tools for Logged Users
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

I have a question: Is there a built-in chat tool books in S/4HC for logged users to communicate between themselves? For instance if I need my document to be approved, I would use teams and ask PiC to approve a doc. But it would be really helpful if there was chat tool box for users that are logged and can communicate each other while operation S/4HC. 

Please let me know if there is any tool of this kind available. 
Best Regards, 

Oksana

entry.title: How to change approval priorities for To-Dos in Home screen
entry.content:
Dear Support, 

I want to change approval priorities in S/4HC, but noticed that most approval tasks are shown in To-Dos section of Home screen as Medium priority and this seems to be default so far. 

Please advise how to change from medium to high and wise-versa?

Best Regards, 

Oksana

entry.title: 是否有日记账分录-附件的API
entry.content:
系统版本：SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2402

目前在做银企项目，银企对接SAP，直接创建日记账分录，并且将银行回单传到日记账分录-附件。

查找了日记账分录创建API，没有看到附件的相关字段。想请教一下，是否有其他接口可以传输附件呢？

entry.title: Is there any possible the conversation amount go to Production overhead Gl account.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are working on the alternative BOM and we have created the below scenario. We are using the S4 hana public cloud and following the below process.

G-RF is the final product and G-ICR and G-HLR consumable product.

  1. We have done the Standard Cost for G-RF - $23.78 and use the G-ICR product in it’s Bill of Materials, and produced in the CHMILL resource department.
  2. We have done the Standard cost for G-HLR - 35.61 and use the G-PCR material in it’s bill of materials, and be made in the CHHEADLA resource department.
  3. G-RF, G-ICR, and G-HLR has been marked as costing relevant.  In the Material master data, under tab Costing 1, those have not the “Do Not Cost” checkbox checked. 
  4. The G-RF having the 2 production versions for making the product. 
    1. The main production version used in costing is 0001 and set to use G-ICR in the BOM, and should use the resource group CHMILL.
    2. The second production version 0002 and set to use G-HLR in the BOM, and use the resource group CHHEADLA
    3. Product Costing done by Production version 0001
  1. We have done the Plan cost and actual for G-HLR. For Actual when making the change from G-HLR to G-RF we need to use a little more G-HLR for transfer loses.  So to make 1 ton of G-RF we used 1.1 tons of G-HLR.

For example: Created order for G-RF using production Version 0002.

6)  Is there a way that we can use a production order to produce G-RF from G-HLR, without effecting the standard cost?

7)  How did we change the G-HLR material into G-RF and have the cost difference post to 530001(Production overhead account) not variance account. 

Regards,

Naveen

entry.title: SAP CAP - Service not created as a view in database
entry.content:
Good morning,

We have a CAP application that is accessing an HDI in a different space. We are trying to expose the entities of one of the entities of this external HDI in our service.

service 
 
ServicesService {
    entity servicesView as projection on dm.ZPMSERVLOC;
}

The issue we are getting is that the view associated to the service is not created in the database although I am seeing it within the gen folder (althoug the hdview object is in a different path than the other database artefacts)

The path in the MTA for the deployer is as follows:

 

name: srv-services-mgmt-cap-db-deployer
  type: hdb
  path: gen/db

Any idea what the issue is?

Thanks!

C.

entry.title: If the CDS views are not released then what is the procedure to use them to create reports?
entry.content:
We are trying to create a report in SAP S/4 HANA Public cloud using standard CDS views.

For fetching data we want to use the below CDS views - 

1) ESH_N_ACCT_DOC_LINEITEM_BSEG_H

But these are not yet released and we cannot create the report. Please suggest a solution.

entry.title: When migrating sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app.The following warning
entry.content:
Hi All,
When migrating  sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app,
The following warning occurs.
"Sheet Schedule Line Data, column 'Order Quantity in Sales Units' : Row xxx will be truncated during transfer."
(Message Class:DMC_MD_INTERPRETER / Message Number:37)The sales unit for the relevant order is KGM, and the order quantity holds two decimal places.Is it not possible to migrate data if the sales unit is KGM and the order quantity has decimal places?
Please help.

entry.title: SAP Business Application Studio : deploy to hana service via icon failed
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I've been following this tutorial: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hana-cloud-cap-create-database-cds

However I'm stuck at step 3.12 the actual deploy step.

When I press the deploy icon my deployment fails with the following error:

 

A key point here is probably that I have Hana Service in my environment instead of Hana Cloud. It's a paid account with premium features not a trial one.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: how to define Tax indicator 0 for use with custom GST condition type ZCGS in SAP Public cloud India
entry.content: how to define Tax indicator 0 for use with custom GST condition type ZCGS in SAP Public cloud India?

entry.title: How to configure reverse calculation for GST condition
entry.content: How to configure reverse calculation for GST condition, to be precise I want to deduct GST from material base price, Please help

entry.title: Tax indicator 0 is not defined for use with condition type ZCGS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am stuck in a situation where I need to assign tax indicator 0(GST registered) to custom GST condition type ZCGS to be applied in pricing procedure, I am not able to find the appropriate path, we have OVK1 in GUI but the same is not applicable for Public Cloud, Please suggest the appropriate solution specific to Public Cloud

Thanks

Rahul Singhal

entry.title: hana db with vector in CAP Application
entry.content:
i am creating a CAP application with HANA DB in business app studio. now i need to have HANA vector engine enabled. is there any specific configuration to be done to have Vector engined enabled or it comes by default?

 

Also any blog to show how to connect hana db of CAP in BTP using python code?

entry.title: Mass Maintenance of Production Versions S4 Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Suggestions other than Customer Influence on how to mass update production versions in S4 Public Cloud MTE.

Requirement is to be able to use selection criteria to select multiple records and then update one or more fields

E.g Production line

entry.title: Conversion Routine in AMDP for MATERIAL (MATNR)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we use 'CONVERSION_EXIT_MATN1_INPUT'  in AMDP, where we need to convert Material No, into internal formant ? we have to avoid loop

entry.title: CD/CD with SAP Native HANA Application dev space
entry.content:
SAP Experts,
Does SAP HANA Native application type of Dev Space inside SAP Business Application Studio supports SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery  integration to transport objects across different spaces?Because most of the blogs that I visited says that CAP based project is the pre-requisite. 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Error during Table Data Import in SAP HANA Cloud Database Explorer
entry.content:
Hi,

I am facing error during importing csv table data file in SAP HANA Database Explorer. PFB image.

Note - This error is intermittent; sometimes import is working fine and sometimes its giving above error.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to insert a record in custom business object from custom logic
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have a query on how to insert a record into one custom business object from custom logic of another custom business object.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: what are the hana cloud services provided by sap till 2017?
entry.content:
Can you please let me know the answer for the below
what are the hana cloud services provided by sap till 2017?(2 correct options)
SAP HANA Scale-Up Platform
SAP HANA Scale-out Platform
SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud
SAP HANA Cloud Platform

entry.title: How to make a request for DB recovery in SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
If we need a SAP HANA Cloud DB recovery, we would like to know what is the procedure required to request recovery.
I'm inquiring about the work plan to be done in case of a recovery situation

1. Contact Point ( Only Incident? )
2. How to make a request for DB recovery.
3. It's usually an emergency, but how fast is it handled?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
